text: Inside this modern, carefully designed space, I feel a sense of curiosity mixed with distance. The glass barrier and the geometric precision evoke both openness and containment, as if innovation is on display, yet just out of reach. The brightly colored wall marked “R+D” draws my attention and hints at creativity or progress, but the setting feels sterile. I sense anticipation, as if I am on the threshold of something meaningful, but there is also a lingering feeling of uncertainty and detachment, as though the deeper purpose behind all this structure is waiting to be revealed.
